title: Workflow Trace Trial Response
description: Per-configuration-run workflow trace row returned by GET /api/v1/experiment-runs/runs/{run_id}/traces.
$comment: trial_id and configuration_run_id expose the same canonical trial/configuration-run identifier under legacy field names; consumers MUST treat them as equal for joining trial results to workflow spans.

trial_id.description: Canonical trial/configuration-run identifier for the trial result. This value MUST equal configuration_run_id in this response.

configuration_run_id.description: Canonical configuration-run identifier for the workflow spans. This value MUST equal trial_id in this response.

quality_score.description: Best-available raw quality metric; null when none. NOT configuration_run.weighted_score.

spans.description: Detailed span rows included only when include_spans=true.
